title: taraxacum parvulum
intro: Taraxacum parvulum, also known as small dandelion or lesser dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent, which may help alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections and skin conditions. The health benefits of Taraxacum parvulum include its potential to support liver and kidney function, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum parvulum, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be made from the leaves, roots, and flowers of the plant.
